title: GBM Compounding Validation & FK-Shuffling Confound Control on rel-stack
summary: Demo notebook analyzing pre-computed Join Reproduction Number (JRN) results from LightGBM probes on RelBench rel-stack dataset. Loads experiment output with JRN matrix (16 join-task pairs across 3 tasks), multi-hop chain compounding test (14 chains, Spearman r=0.68), and FK-shuffling decomposition into structural vs feature components. Includes bootstrap CI computation, paired t-test, Wilcoxon test, Cohen's d, and three visualizations: JRN heatmap, compounding scatter plot, and decomposition bar chart.
